source: Documentation compiler for accepted feedback build .codewiki/builds/feedback/2026-05-12-control-room-simplification.json
summary: Applied accepted Control Room simplification to product/system KB and opened TASK-067 as the implementation follow-up.
knowledge_changes: Control Room product spec now defines the UI as a high-signal second screen beside chat, with top-level Status/Product/System/Board/Graph only.
Status Panel product spec now mirrors the simplified section model and treats diff/build/validation/settings details as contextual.
Control Room system spec now adds Product view extraction, diagram catalog/data endpoints, diagram picker semantics, and contextual artifact access boundaries.
File Structure, Knowledge, and System Overview now allow `.codewiki/kb/system/diagrams/**` as the intended nested system exception for YAML diagram raw data.
Created diagram raw data contract and initial five YAML diagram specs: context map, component/container map, key flow sequence, data/domain model, and state/lifecycle map.
roadmap_changes: TASK-067 created: Simplify Control Room second-screen UI with acceptance for simplified nav, Status rename, curated Product view, System diagram YAML rendering, roadmap-focused Board/Graph, contextual detail access, and tests.
assumptions: Archived TASK-057..064 remain historical completed work; TASK-067 is the new follow-up implementation task.
YAML diagram specs are canonical raw data for now; renderer-specific output is non-canonical unless a later task promotes it.
